svg.title: Design process: Learn, Define, Design, Test, Refine, then Dev Handoff, with an iteration loop from Refine back to Design. Learn covers conduct research, analyze data, competitor analysis, explore solutions and review trends. Define covers synthesize research, develop personas, set goals, create roadmap and define challenge. Design covers sketch ideas, test design, refine prototype, polished design and test plan. Test covers user testing, gather feedback, analyze results, iterate design and prepare launch. Refine covers review feedback, implement changes, finalize design, prepare delivery and conduct retrospective.
